services.name: Midnight in Florence

services.name: Quiz Trova-la-tua-fragranza

services.name: Programma Rivenditori
services.description: Rete di profumerie e rivenditori partner (sezione 'I Nostri Rivenditori'). Distribuzione curata da Roby Profumi.

content.about: Amioud è il primo brand specializzato in profumi per capelli ad alta concentrazione: estratti di profumo ispirati alla profumeria artistica, pensati per avvolgere i capelli con eleganza, senza danneggiarli. Le formule sono arricchite con cheratina vegetale e olio di semi di lino, prive di alcol aggressivo. La vision: un mondo in cui il profumo non è solo un dettaglio, ma un'estensione della personalità — anche nei capelli. Fragranze unisex, inclusive, definite dal carattere e non dal genere. Made in Italy, distribuito da Roby Profumi, spedizione gratuita in Italia sopra €50.
values: Profumeria artistica (naso creativo per la fibra capillare)
Estratti ad alta concentrazione per un'esperienza olfattiva intensa e duratura
Formule hair-friendly: senza alcol aggressivo, con cheratina e olio di lino
Unisex e inclusivo: fragranze senza genere
Made with intention: ogni fragranza racconta una storia

scrape_method: Jina Reader (r.jina.ai) — WebFetch tier 2. Firecrawl MCP was not invoked; Jina returned complete markdown + image URLs + metadata on first hit.

flags.message: Industry does not map to any of the five canonical values {tech, construction, restaurant, professional-services, other}. Amioud is a D2C luxury hair-fragrance e-commerce brand. The existing 'wellness' starter (Website/starters/wellness) is the only plausible fit but was not in the schema's enum. Master must ask Denis which starter to use before proceeding. Also: current pipeline has no e-commerce primitive — Denis may want the build to function as a brand/editorial site with outbound links to the Shopify store, not a full product-catalog replacement.
/pages/about returns 404. Vision/mission copy was pulled from /pages/la-nostra-vision instead.

Denis has a folder at 'Website/pitchdeck amioud/' containing 12 slide PNGs (1.png-12.png, plus variantegialla.png), Amioudrev.pdf, Amioudrev.xlsx, and brandmanual_compressed (2).pdf. NOT ingested here — analysis.json is live-site only. Master may want the researcher or brief-writer to consult it (especially the brand manual for tokens and the deck for positioning).

The home-page hero appears to use a video (the 'preview_images/…thumbnail.0000000000_1100x.jpg' pattern is a Shopify video-poster URL). Only the low-res poster was captured. Asset-gatherer should probe for the underlying MP4/MOV source on the Shopify CDN.
Not found on the live site. Copyright footer shows 2026. VAT 13285940014 is an Italian number; founding date could be inferred from Camera di Commercio lookup — researcher's job, not analyzer's.
